response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified segments: 00:00-00:13 intro, 00:13-03:40 first song, 03:40-03:44 transition, 03:44-05:00 second song. 2. Identified first song '朧' via credits '作詞:Dali. 作曲・編曲:Starving Trancer / Ryu☆'. Searched for lyrics. 3. Identified second song 'Harmonia' via credits '作詞・作曲・編曲:Konami Arcade Games (PON)' and on-screen text 'Harmonia'. Searched for lyrics. 4. Compiled metadata and full lyrics.
response.global_summary: A video featuring two VTubers, Shiranui Flare and IRyS, performing the song 'Oboro' (朧) together, followed by a solo performance of 'Harmonia' by Shiranui Flare.

scenes.description: Introductory greeting and talk by Shiranui Flare.
Performance of 'Oboro' (朧) by Shiranui Flare and IRyS. Credits: 作詞:Dali. 作曲・編曲:Starving Trancer / Ryu☆.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
追いかけても　追いかけても
するり指を抜ける　水のような
あなただけに　あなただけに
見つめられたただ　一つ星の手に
夢でも　つかまえて
[... Full lyrics for this song ... ]
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Tracing the memories
Like a hazy, ephemeral dream
I reach out
But my hands grasp only the empty air
[... Full translation for this song ... ]

Performance of 'Harmonia' by Shiranui Flare. Credits: 作詞・作曲・編曲:Konami Arcade Games (PON).
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
世界が輝くその瞬間
ちょっとでも触れたくって
ごらんよ幻をのぞいて
空間が重なって溶けあう

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The moment the world shines
I want to touch it, even a little
Look, peek into the illusion
The space overlaps and melts together
